# Beeline Sprinkler Repair

> Family owned, licensed and insured irrigation company serving the Treasure Valley, Idaho since 2015. Sprinkler repair, new installation, winterization, spring turn-on, backflow service, main and drain replacement, valve repair, and controller replacement across Nampa, Boise, Meridian, Caldwell, Eagle, Kuna, Star, and Middleton.

## Business Info

- Phone: (208) 880-2712
- Email: beelinesprinklerrepair@gmail.com
- Address: 5606 W Amity Rd, Nampa, ID 83687
- Service Area: Treasure Valley, Idaho (Nampa, Boise, Meridian, Caldwell, Eagle, Kuna, Star, Middleton)
- Hours: Monday–Friday 8am–6pm
- Licensed: Idaho Registered Contractor
- Insured: Full liability coverage on every job
- Reviews: 136+ five-star Google reviews
- In business since: 2015

## Services

- Sprinkler Repair
- New Sprinkler System Installation
- Spring Turn-On
- Winterization and Blowout
- Main and Drain Replacement
- Backflow Testing and Replacement
- Valve Repair
- Controller Replacement
- Head Replacement
- Emergency Sprinkler Repair
- Monthly Service Plans ($35–$55/month)

## Pricing

Most sprinkler repairs run $100–$300. Monthly service plans start at $35/month for 1–5 zones, $45/month for 6–10 zones, $55/month for 11–15 zones. Plans include monthly checkup, spring turn-on, fall blowout, and priority scheduling.

## About

Beeline Sprinkler Repair is a family owned and operated irrigation company based in Nampa, Idaho. Founded in 2015 by Mark Rust. The company handles residential sprinkler repair and installation across all eight Treasure Valley cities. Known for honest pricing, same-day service availability, and transparency — diagnosing first and giving customers a straight answer before any work begins.
